plugins.name: specode
plugins.description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow orchestration shell — requirements → design → tasks → execute → acceptance, 4 fixed docs per spec.

plugins.name: task-swarm
plugins.description: Standalone multi-agent orchestration driven by a pipeline.yml — fork coders + per-group reviewer/validator loops.

plugins.name: obsidian-wiki
plugins.description: Maintain an Obsidian LLM-Wiki — deterministic structure layer + content curation + unified orchestrator.

plugins.name: ragkit
plugins.description: Standalone knowledge-base RAG — vector + lexical + metadata three-channel recall, RRF-fused.
